claim_ceiling: Split-first retrospective computation on hash-frozen, already-measured effect dictionaries: Zhu and Replogle measure within-dictionary compression/self-reconstruction, and Norman measures K562 single-to-double additivity/alignment. Twelve deterministic splits measure algorithmic row-partition sensitivity only. The reference acquisition audit evaluates supplied measured candidates against the same declared catalog and is not a generalization test. This is not coverage of an independent biological target catalog, prospective library design, prioritization of unmeasured candidates, biological reachability, state conversion, or experimental validation.

provenance.candidate_status: Every ranked candidate is a supplied, already-measured effect atom held out from the current computational library; the benchmark does not rank unmeasured genes or experiments.

zhu.identity: Zhu et al., Primary Human CD4+ T Cell Perturb-seq, VCP v1.0 processed release
zhu.local_cache_creation_date: deterministically rebuilt from the registered source contract on 2026-07-19
zhu.license_note: The VCP v1.0 dataset card labels the processed dataset MIT and also requires compliance with the VCP Acceptable Use Policy; the local NPZ is a derived, gitignored cache.

norman.identity: Norman et al. 2019 CRISPRa Perturb-seq processed through GEARS 0.0.2 and redistributed by VCP
norman.dataset_card_version: v1.0 source; processed data are GEARS 0.0.2
norman.local_cache_creation_date: deterministically rebuilt from the registered source contract on 2026-07-19
norman.license_note: The VCP v1.0 Norman dataset card labels the processed GEARS-derived dataset MIT and requires compliance with the VCP Acceptable Use Policy.

upstream_metadata_discrepancy.handling: The Norman paper explicitly describes K562 cells. This report uses canonical K562, records the redistributed A549 label as an upstream metadata discrepancy, and does not use that field computationally.

replogle.identity: Replogle et al. 2022 K562 day-6 essential-gene CRISPRi Perturb-seq, VCP v1.0 processed benchmark redistribution
replogle.local_cache_creation_date: deterministically rebuilt from the registered source contract on 2026-07-19
replogle.license_note: The VCP v1.0 processed benchmark dataset card displays the license label 'CC BY NA SA 4.0' and requires compliance with the VCP Acceptable Use Policy; users should consult the source card for the controlling terms.

cache_build.writer_contract: pickle-free uncompressed NPZ with canonical little-endian C-contiguous arrays, fixed member order, ZIP timestamps, and permissions

zhu.effect_rows: Rest condition with ontarget_significant=true in registered source order

norman.gene_axis_note: legacy cache symbols were unique, but portable v1 uses upstream Ensembl gene_id for a stable identifier axis; E, perts, and ncells remain bit-for-bit unchanged
norman.source_matrix_semantics: processed/log-transformed expression in X as redistributed; exact upstream normalization is not independently frozen and the values are accepted as-is; not raw counts

replogle.gene_axis_note: portable v1 uses unique upstream Ensembl gene_id; E, perts, and ncells remain bit-for-bit unchanged from the legacy cache
replogle.feature_name_note: upstream feature_name has 4999 unique labels across 5000 columns because TBCE occurs twice; unique gene_id is the fail-closed transport axis
replogle.source_matrix_semantics: processed/log-transformed expression in X as redistributed; exact upstream normalization is not independently frozen and the values are accepted as-is; not raw counts

analysis.strict_inside_cone_definition: reachability.project_cone geometry_status == inside_tolerance under the core's certified default numerical tolerance
analysis.soft_coverage_definition: best cone-projection cosine >= 0.5; an application-chosen alignment summary, not geometric cone membership
analysis.acquisition_certificate: sum over strict outside-cone targets of positive unit-candidate alignment with the certified dual separator, weighted by residual fraction
analysis.primary_realized_acquisition_objective: gain in mean catalog cosine after adding one supplied, already-measured candidate effect atom
secondary_realized_acquisition_objective: gain in soft cosine-threshold coverage fraction
analysis.top1_comparison: Every acquisition pool is required to contain unique effect-atom labels and exactly one supplied candidate per canonical perturbation label. Exact-row and canonical-label top-1 agreement are therefore identical by construction and are reported once. Norman groups by canonical gene before role assignment and freezes one measured representative row per gene (GENE+ctrl preferred, ctrl+GENE only if absent). Ties use stable supplied-candidate order.
analysis.status_definition: PASS means every configured cache identity and schema verified and the descriptive computation completed; it does not require a minimum rank correlation or a top-1 match
analysis.inference: descriptive retrospective computation; split sensitivity is algorithmic robustness over correlated row partitions, not sampling uncertainty, prospective outcome prediction, or biological reachability inference

split_sensitivity.acquisition_scope: coverage and fixed comparators only; the expensive acquisition audit remains the declared reference split
split_sensitivity.summary: median, interquartile range, 5th/95th percentile, extrema, and positive-split count over deterministic correlated row partitions

zhu_crispri_tcell.effect_definition: donor-collapsed Rest-condition differential-expression log-fold-change rows from the registered Zhu source reconstruction cache
zhu_crispri_tcell.eligible_effect_pool: all 6871 Rest-condition rows admitted upstream by the registered ontarget_significant field; no benchmark-outcome magnitude filter
zhu_crispri_tcell.feature_selection: stable top-400 variance coordinates from the 50 current-library rows after the retrospective row split; catalog and candidate rows do not participate

norman_k562_crispra.effect_definition: per-condition mean processed expression minus control mean in the VCP/GEARS-derived Norman cache
norman_k562_crispra.feature_selection: full additivity description: stable top-400 variance coordinates from all 152 position-specific single-perturbation rows only; acquisition and split sensitivity: group by 105 canonical genes, freeze one measured cassette-position representative per gene, then select a separate stable top-400 set from each current 40-gene library only; doubles and candidates never select those features

replogle_k562_essential_crispri.effect_definition: per-condition mean processed expression minus control mean in the VCP K562 essential-gene cache
replogle_k562_essential_crispri.feature_selection: stable top-400 variance coordinates from the 50 current-library rows after the retrospective row split; catalog and candidate rows do not participate
